extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Meety needs access to your camera for video calls.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Meety needs access to your microphone for audio calls.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Meety needs screen capture for presenting your screen.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Meety needs audio capture for sharing system audio during screen sharing.
